use_cases: Displaying tiered subscription pricing for SaaS products
Allowing users to toggle between monthly and yearly billing cycles
Comparing features across different subscription plans
Converting website visitors to paid subscribers with clear pricing
Showcasing cloud storage or subscription-based service tiers
ai_summary: A React pricing card component featuring interactive plan selection with animated transitions between monthly and yearly billing cycles. Built with motion/react and NumberFlow for smooth price animations, it displays three subscription tiers (Plus, Standard, Advanced) with features like storage space and security options. The component uses a minimalist design with heavily rounded corners and subtle shadows, making it ideal for SaaS products, cloud services, and subscription-based platforms requiring clear tiered pricing displays.
